$comment: Example scope contract. The Steward writes the live version to handoffs/current-scope.json when ratifying a workstream. The pretooluse-scope-guard hook (once activated) reads the live file and mechanically denies Edit/Write calls outside allowedGlobs or matching forbiddenGlobs. Paths use forward slashes relative to the repo root.
objective: Add a provenance side panel to the diagnostic workbench showing, for each governed fact used in an answer, its source, ingestion date, and approval state.
nonGoals: No changes to the fact ingestion pipeline itself
No redesign of the workbench layout beyond the added panel

proofRequirements.mustShow: all tests passing, literal runner summary pasted in handoff
no regressions vs. baseline recorded before the change
panel renders an explicit 'no provenance available' state, never fabricated fields

rollbackAnchor: git tag ws-example-baseline (create on branch before first Builder edit)
stopConditions: Builder stops when proofs run and handoff is written; does not merge
Sweeper stops if baseline suite is red
Any agent stops immediately if work requires editing a forbiddenGlob
